description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and a metal receiver, barrel, and handguard. The handguard is perforated with a series of cooling holes along the top, and the barrel is relatively short and cylindrical. A prominent drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, indicating a high-capacity feeding system. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, with the front sight post and rear notch both visible. The overall finish combines a dark metallic sheen on the metal components with a rich, reddish-brown wood grain on the stock and grip. The construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, metal receiver, and a drum magazine, featuring iron sights and a perforated handguard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden stock, metal receiver, perforated handguard, and drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine, barrel muzzle, and front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and drum magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
